UsageCost: Extra fees for exceeding time limit(3hrs.for AC,shorter for DC)+highway fee for PHEVs(25% of full highway fee).

AddressInfo.Title: PRE Highway Charging Station(AC+DC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Access only via highway(way to Praha),no highway fee for BEVs & FCEVs,75% discount from full price for PHEVs,vehicles unable to sustain speed @ least 80Kph has banned access to highway,thus also to this charging station.

Connections.Comments: L-N voltage mentioned(L-L voltage is 400V). KWh:8CZK for PRE registered users;10CZK for non-registered users;13.5CZK for E.On users. Extra fees for exceeding 3hrs.of continuous charging!!!To avoid restart charging every 3hrs..Hidden socket with side-opening wings-type cover,opens,when U push the cable against into the socket.
